name: prompt-advisor-monorepo
description: Production-grade monorepo for Prompt Advisor (FastAPI + React/TS Chrome Extension MV3)

scripts.setup:backend: cd apps/backend && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.generate-types: cd apps/backend && .venv/bin/python -m app.scripts.generate_openapi && cd ../.. && npx openapi-typescript apps/backend/openapi.json -o apps/extension/src/types/api.ts
